message:
feat: Implement Presenter with state-tracked ANSI emission

- Add Presenter with style/link tracking and run grouping
- Implement LinkRegistry for OSC 8 hyperlink management
- Use ansi module for all sequence generation
- Add ftui-core dependency for TerminalCapabilities
- Close bd-10i.4.3 (Presenter) bead

All blocking dependencies for Phase 2 render pipeline complete:
- Cell, Buffer, GraphemePool, BufferDiff, ANSI generator, Presenter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,8 +4,15 @@ version = "0.1.0"
 edition = "2024"
 publish = false
 
+[features]
+default = []
+# Enable performance tracing spans
+tracing = ["ftui-core/tracing"]
+
 [dependencies]
 bitflags = "2.10.0"
+unicode-width = "0.2"
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core" }
 # Note: ftui-render is the core kernel and should not depend on ftui-style.
 # ftui-style depends on ftui-render (not vice versa).
 # ftui-layout = { path = "../ftui-layout" }  # TODO: Add when needed
